reason: Frontend spec entrypoint — design token authority + guideline index, needed when touching theme-aware components.
Widget patterns + Material Design 3 conventions; covers StatefulShellRoute usage and selected-state styling for segmented controls.
Riverpod provider conventions; relevant because `currentExportSourceKindProvider` is the cross-screen handoff used as the deep-link fallback.
WindowSizeClass + sheet/panel rules; ExportScreen body layout follows these conventions and should not regress.
Lint/test/format gates that the implementation must satisfy before completion.
